completed_tasks.name: Rename src/docsift to src/sif and update pyproject.toml
Update constants, metadata, and CLI migration logic
Update all Python imports in src/sif/
Update test imports and patch targets
Rename Claude skills to sif-search and sif-get
Run full quality suite and final verification
Fix verifier gaps: DOCSIFT_ env vars and GitHub URLs

decisions.decision: Bulk sed replacement for docsift→sif was too naive for GitHub URLs
decisions.rationale: github.com/docsift/docsift became github.com/sif/sif instead of github.com/zhangtaolab/sif

decisions.decision: README.md Configuration section env vars were missed by initial sed
decisions.rationale: DOCSIFT_* examples in code blocks were not caught by targeted replacements

next_action: Phase 08 is complete. This was the final phase of the v1.0 milestone. Consider running /gsd-complete-milestone to archive.
context_notes: All 8 phases of v1.0 milestone are complete. Phase 08 rename from DocSift to SIF is fully verified with 10/10 must-haves, 377 tests passing, zero failures.
